gt_sql: SELECT T2.url FROM constructorResults AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T2.constructorId = T1.constructorId WHERE T1.raceId = 9 ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT c.url
FROM constructorResults cr
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE cr.raceId = 9
ORDER BY cr.points DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: For the constructor which got the highest point in the race No. 9 , what is its introduction website?
